creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Duane from comment #0)

Hello Duane,

It seems that more than 3 years passed and this PR still open.

I'm new to this program but I already taking a look at:

https://github.com/VirtualGL/virtualgl/blob/main/server/vglserver_config
and
https://rawcdn.githack.com/VirtualGL/virtualgl/main/doc/index.html#hd006002

Are you still using this software?

Thanks
